<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT\Signer\Key; use InvalidArgumentException; use Lcobucci\JWT\Exception; use Throwable; final class FileCouldNotBeRead extends InvalidArgumentException implements Exception { /** @param non-empty-string $path */ public static function onPath(string $path, ?Throwable $cause = null): self { return new self( message: 'The path "' . $path . '" does not contain a valid key file', previous: $cause, ); } }
